name: Topological Acoustic Knots
description: Orientational director field inspired by liquid crystals where audio frequencies drive topological defect creation, motion, and annihilation. Mouse can pin or create defects. Iridescent oil-slick coloring with flowing directional fields.

params.name: Defect Speed
params.description: How fast defects move and pair/annihilate

params.name: Flow Strength
params.description: Strength of painterly flow field stripes
